title: KIDS' HOPE CENTER - 211info
text: KIDS' HOPE CENTER KIDS' HOPE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations and forensic evaluations. Offers advocacy services, off-site therapy and counseling referrals, community trainings, and prevention education. 1925 Thompson Road Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 with suspected history of child abuse Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 226-8806 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 226-8806 Main phone Main phone (541) 226-8806 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of legal custody AREA SERVED: Coos County Services: Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Therapy Referrals * Child Abuse Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
